name: prompt-manager
description: 提示词模板管理与批量生成桌面应用
author: a1meon

scripts.clean:pack: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const targets=['release','dist','.vite','.cache','node_modules/.cache']; for(const t of targets){ fs.rmSync(path.resolve(t),{recursive:true,force:true}); }"
scripts.pack:exe: npm run clean:pack && npm run build && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& electron-builder --win portable
scripts.pack:exe:small: npm run clean:pack && npm run build && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& electron-builder --win portable -c.compression=maximum
scripts.pack:exe:fast: npm run clean:pack && npm run build && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& electron-builder --win portable -c.compression=normal
scripts.pack:installer: npm run clean:pack && npm run build && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& electron-builder --win nsis

nsis.artifactName: 一世提示词管理-安装程序.exe
